completed_tasks.name: Extract PlaylistGenerator interface, expand PlaylistViewModel, add PlaylistViewModelTest
Create PlaylistScreen composable and wire into MainActivity
Install fixed build on device and verify Looper fix works
completed_tasks.progress: Installed via ./gradlew :app:installDebug. Generation ran to completion — no more 'No internet' misclassification. Looper fix confirmed. Hit quota at playlist insertion step.

completed_tasks.name: Reduce TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT to 3 for quota-friendly testing
completed_tasks.progress: Uncommitted: ArtistSelectionUseCase.TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT set to 3 (was 65). Debug logging added to AuthInterceptor and AuthRepositoryImpl. Needs commit or revert before final UAT.

remaining_tasks.name: Wait for YouTube quota reset, run one clean generation (with 3 artists or restore to 65)
Restore TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT to 65 (or chosen final value) before shipping
Verify AliMusings populated with songs, then approve Phase 4 checkpoint

blockers.description: YouTube Data API daily quota exhausted. As of 2026-03-27 ~08:40 CT, 6,650/10,000 units used. Not enough headroom for a full 65-artist run (~6,500 units). With 3 artists the cost is ~300 units — should succeed after reset.
blockers.workaround: Wait for quota reset (midnight Pacific). Check https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/api/youtube.googleapis.com/quotas — look for usage to drop back to ~0. Then run with 3 artists to confirm end-to-end, then restore to 65.

human_actions_pending.action: After quota resets: commit debug changes (for 3-artist test run) or revert them, rebuild app, tap Generate Playlist, verify AliMusings is populated
human_actions_pending.context: Uncommitted changes include TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT=3 (debug) and extra Log statements in AuthInterceptor + AuthRepositoryImpl. Decide: commit for cheap 3-artist test, or revert to 65 for full run. Either way rebuild and reinstall.

human_actions_pending.action: After successful generation, restore TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT to 65 and remove debug Log statements, then type 'confirmed fixed' to close Phase 4 checkpoint
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 4 completes after checkpoint approval -> gsd:verify-work -> ROADMAP advances to Phase 5 (polish/cache)

decisions.decision: Fix AuthRepositoryImpl.refreshAccessToken() with withContext(Dispatchers.Main) for AppAuth performTokenRequest
decisions.rationale: AppAuth creates an Android Handler internally requiring a Looper. OkHttp interceptor threads have no Looper, causing RuntimeException wrapped as IOException, misclassified as NetworkError ('No internet connection').

decisions.decision: Fix YouTubeRepositoryImpl.deletePlaylist() to only swallow 404, not all exceptions via runCatching
decisions.rationale: Original runCatching silently hid 403/401 errors from deletePlaylist. Now only 404 (playlist already gone) is suppressed; quota/auth errors propagate correctly.

decisions.decision: Temporarily reduce TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT from 65 to 3 for quota-friendly testing
decisions.rationale: User requested this to overcome YouTube API quota limits during testing. 3 artists = ~300 quota units vs 6,500 for 65. Must be restored to 65 before final release.

next_action: Decide whether to commit debug changes (for 3-artist test run) or revert them (for full 65-artist run). Then after quota resets, rebuild app, run generation, verify AliMusings playlist is populated. Then restore TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT=65 and remove debug logs.
context_notes: Phase 4 is functionally complete. Both core bugs fixed (Looper + deletePlaylist). An additional debug session happened where TARGET_ARTIST_COUNT was reduced to 3 and extra logging added to aid diagnosis. These changes are uncommitted. The decision is whether to do a quick 3-artist test first (cheaper on quota) or go straight to full 65-artist run once quota resets.
